author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(insights): rename $$clickAnalytics to $$automatic  (#5902)
body:
* fix(insights): declare automatic source

* chore(insights): rename $$clickAnalytics to $$automatic

When the only use case is to disable click analytics parameter, that makes sense, but if we want to use that for a flag in the algoliaSource too, i think the name should be something like $$automatic

* meaning needs to swap

* Update packages/instantsearch.js/src/middlewares/createInsightsMiddleware.ts
